prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为11130→12236→16589→14334→15171，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年因试卷难度变化出现明显后移至16589，2024年回弹至14334 ，2025年再度后移至15171，近两年基准位次约14300–15200区间，2025年基准约15171名；2021–2024年物理类计划均为104人，2025年扩至122人，2026年 计划123人，较2025年微增1人（+0.82%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第45 位持续上升至2026年第42位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；2022年声誉周期内曾因校园安全事件获偏负面评价，但近年声誉 平稳，2026年声誉文件中未见该校重大负面舆情。抖音热度排名第34位（较热），短视频平台曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度一般偏暖。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获A+（全国顶尖），化学获A-，控制科学与工程获A-。化工学科实力突出，与该校招生专业中的工科试验班（智慧化工）、化学类、应用 化学等高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，华东理工大学在上述领域均有招 生，对高分考生有吸引力。河北省2026年普通高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（606754人）微增约0.5%；按近年物理类占比约60%估算，2026年物理类考生约365880人，较2025 年（363040人）略增约0.78%，考生规模小幅扩大，竞争略有加剧。省控线方面，河北物理类本科批从2024年448分升至2025年459分，显示整体竞争强度上升；华东理工大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对河北考生有较强地域吸引力。该校在河北物理类招生计划占其全国总计划比例适中，未见明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合20 25年基准位次15171名、2026年计划微扩0.82%、考生总数小幅增长约0.78%、省控线上行、学校排名上升及专业热度支撑等多因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在15171基础上 小幅后移。预测最低位次约15276名，区间14776–15776名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 11130 → 12236 → 16589 → 14334 → 15171, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. In 2023, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was a significant drop to 16589, rebounding to 14334 in 2024, and then declining again to 15171 in 2025. In the past two years, the baseline ranking has been around 14300–15200, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 15171. From 2021 to 2024, the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 104 students each year, expanding to 122 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 123 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+0.82%) compared to 2025. The small expansion slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in overall strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. During the 2022 reputation cycle, there were some negative evaluations due to a campus safety incident, but recent years have seen stable reputation. The 2026 reputation report shows no major negative public opinion about the university. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms, indicating generally warm but not extremely high application attention. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received A+ (top in the country), Chemistry received A-, and Control Science and Engineering received A-. The strength in chemical engineering is prominent and highly relevant to the university's enrollment majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering), Chemistry, and Applied Chemistry, providing strong support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. East China University of Science and Technology offers these majors, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Gaokao examinees is approximately 609,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (606,754). Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 365,880, a slight increase of about 0.78% from 2025 (363,040), indicating a small expansion in candidate numbers and slightly intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Hebei Physics Category undergraduate batch line rose from 448 in 2024 to 459 in 2025, showing an overall increase in competition intensity. East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates. The proportion of its enrollment plan in Hebei Physics Category relative to its total national plan is moderate, with no significant changes in regional preference observed.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15171, a slight 0.82% expansion in the 2026 plan, a small 0.78% increase in total examinees, an upward trend in provincial control lines, the university's rising ranking, and support from major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline from 15171. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15276, with a range of 14776–15776.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 15276, with a range of 14776–15776. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Materials Science, Biology) as safe choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 14776) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the upper bound (around 15776) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 advantageous majors (such as Smart Chemical Engineering, backed by the A+ discipline).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 2097 → 2445 → 3329 → 3741 → 3836, continuously shifting backward for five consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of approximately 1739 places, indicating a clear backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3836 places; from 2021 to 2026, the enrollment plan for History Category remains at 24 students, unchanged for six consecutive years, with a stable enrollment scale and no impact from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking rose from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, and no major negative public opinion about the university was found in the 2026 reputation document. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately warm. No records of admission gaps were found; East China University of Science and Technology is known for science and engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Administration, Landscape Architecture) have no directly corresponding A-level disciplines, but the overall 211 platform supports liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see, and Public Administration is generally wait-and-see. The total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025; based on the recent History Category proportion of about 40%, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 243,960, basically flat with a slight increase from 2025 (243,714). Regarding the provincial control line, the Hebei History Category undergraduate batch rose from 449 points in 2024 to 477 points in 2025, a significant increase of 28 points, reflecting intensified competition in the History Category; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Hebei liberal arts candidates, but the university offers few liberal arts enrollment majors (only 6), limiting choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the five-year continuous backward trend in History Category rankings, stable enrollment plan, slight increase in candidate numbers, significant upward movement of the provincial control line, and differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from 3836. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3856, with a range of 3356–4356.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3856, range 3356–4356. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 Law and Economics as reach options, and Tier 3 Public Administration and Landscape Architecture as safety choices. There are only 6 enrollment majors in the History Category, limiting choices; it is suggested to consider Law (advantageous for civil service exams) and Economics (broad employment prospects) based on personal interests and career plans.
